title: Apple Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates on Strong Services Growth
summary: Apple reported better-than-expected Q1 results driven by record services revenue of $25B. iPhone sales exceeded analyst expectations despite a challenging smartphone market.

title: Apple Faces Regulatory Headwinds in EU Digital Markets Act
summary: The European Commission has opened a new investigation into Apple's compliance with the Digital Markets Act, focusing on App Store policies and developer fees.

title: Microsoft Azure AI Revenue Surges 50% in Q2
summary: Microsoft reported Azure AI services revenue growth of 50% year-over-year, with AI contributing an annualized revenue run rate of $65B. Copilot adoption across enterprises continues to accelerate.

title: Microsoft Activision Deal Faces FTC Scrutiny on Cloud Gaming
summary: The FTC has raised new concerns about Microsoft's $69B Activision Blizzard acquisition, particularly regarding cloud gaming market concentration and content exclusivity.

title: Google Cloud Turns Profitable for First Time
summary: Alphabet reported that Google Cloud achieved operating profitability for the first time, posting $1.2B in operating income on $12B in quarterly revenue, driven by AI infrastructure demand.

title: Alphabet Faces Antitrust Trial Over Search Dominance
summary: The US Department of Justice's antitrust trial against Alphabet began this week, alleging illegal monopoly maintenance in general search services and search text advertising.

title: Amazon AWS Announces New AI Chips to Compete with Nvidia
summary: Amazon Web Services unveiled Trainium3 and Inferentia3 AI accelerators, claiming 2.5x better price-performance than comparable Nvidia chips for AI training and inference workloads.

title: Amazon Faces Supply Chain Disruptions Ahead of Holiday Season
summary: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and labor shortages are creating significant supply chain challenges for Amazon's retail operations, potentially impacting holiday season fulfillment.

title: Apple Supplier TSMC Reports Strong 3nm Chip Demand for iPhone 17
summary: TSMC indicated that capacity for its advanced 3nm process node is fully booked through 2026, with Apple as the primary customer. The next-generation A19 chip is expected to deliver 20% performance gains.

title: Microsoft Announces AI Safety Framework for Enterprise Customers
summary: Microsoft introduced a comprehensive AI safety framework including red-teaming requirements, content filters, and governance dashboards for enterprise Copilot deployments.
